name: Vidalia Onion Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Ritz crackers, crushed or any buttery crackers
2 cups Vidalia onions, thinly sliced or any sweet onion or yellow onions
3/4 cup milk, do not use low-fat or nonfat
3/4 cup sharp cheddar cheese, packed and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix crackers and 4 tbsp butter in a bowl until well blended. Press the mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of an 8-inch pie plate.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons butter in a heavy, medium skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until tender about 12 minutes.
4. Arrange onions on top of the cracker crust.
5. Beat milk, eggs, and salt together in a medium bowl until blended. Season with pepper.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the onions in the crust.
7. Sprinkle cheese over the filling and then sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake the pie until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
9. Garnish with parsley and serve.
